title: SKOS
abstract: SKOS is a W3C data model for publishing thesauri, taxonomies, classification schemes and other knowledge organization systems on the Web.
description: A technology record for controlled vocabularies and lightweight semantic organization.

sources.title: SKOS Simple Knowledge Organization System Reference

roleInEcosystem: SKOS provides a lightweight model for labels, broader and narrower concepts, associative links, concept schemes and vocabulary mappings.
bodyHtml:
Role

SKOS represents concepts, labels, notes, hierarchies, associations and mappings without requiring the full formal expressivity of OWL.

Use

It is relevant to Electronic Artefacts disciplines, tags, multilingual labels and future vocabulary exports.

References

See W3C SKOS, Ontology and Metadata.
